narrative:
Auglaize County has 31,788 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.8% of registrants.
